prompt.prompt_text:
You are analyzing a television commercial for corpus-linguistic and multimodal discourse analysis.

You are given sampled frames from a video clip. The frames are in chronological order.
Treat the frames as a temporal sequence from one commercial, not as independent images.

Describe the visual content of the commercial as it unfolds over time.
Describe only what is visually supported by the frames.

Do not guess dialogue, slogans, music, voice-over, or other audio content.
If something is unclear or not visible in the sampled frames, say so.

output.response_text:
The commercial opens on a black screen.

It then cuts to a close-up product-demonstration image: a white absorbent pad-like item shown against a mostly black background. The center area is brightened with a pale yellow-white glow, and the surrounding material appears light pinkish/white. At the bottom, small white text reads: “VS. LEADING REGULAR SIZED THICK NON-WINGED MAXIS.” A dark rounded shape is visible along the right edge.

The next scene shows a young woman with long blonde/light brown hair in a softly lit bedroom or dorm-like room. She is smiling and looking directly toward the camera. She wears a cream-colored knit turtleneck sweater. In the background there is a bicycle on the left, light curtains, a bed on the right, wooden flooring, and other room furnishings.

The ad briefly returns to the close-up demonstration image of the absorbent pad-like product, again emphasizing the bright central area.

It then cuts back to the young woman in closer view. She continues facing the camera with a pleasant, conversational expression. The background is softly blurred, with pale furnishings and possibly a bed or dresser behind her.

A wider shot follows: the woman sits cross-legged on a patterned rug on the wooden floor. She wears blue jeans and black high-top sneakers with white laces and soles. The room remains bright and airy, with the bicycle visible on the left and a bed on the right.

Another close-up of the woman appears. She is slightly angled, smiling or speaking toward the camera. At the bottom of the frame, the same small comparison text appears again: “VS. LEADING REGULAR SIZED THICK NON-WINGED MAXIS.”

The final shots are product-title graphics on a turquoise background. A dark green label at the top left reads “NEW.” Near the top center is a circular logo with teal and pink shapes. Large text reads “always with CHANNELS,” and a dark horizontal band below reads “MAXI with WINGS.” In the last frame, an additional line appears at the bottom: “Cleaner. Drier. Protects Better.”
